web_login (postgre)

-- Table: public.web_login

-- DROP TABLE IF EXISTS public.web_login;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.web_login

(

id character varying(25) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
cari_kod character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
email character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
password_hash text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
role user_role NOT NULL DEFAULT 'CUSTOMER'::user_role,
is_active boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
last_login_at timestamp with time zone,
created_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now(),
updated_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now(),
CONSTRAINT web_cari_login_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
CONSTRAINT unique_email UNIQUE (email)

)

TABLESPACE pg_default;

ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.web_login

OWNER to postgres;

COMMENT ON TABLE public.web_login

IS 'Web portalı kullanıcı giriş bilgileri (Admin + Cari)';

COMMENT ON COLUMN public.web_login.cari_kod

IS 'SQL Server''daki CARI.KOD değeri';

COMMENT ON COLUMN public.web_login.password_hash

IS 'Sadece Admin için bcrypt hash - Cari için NULL';

web_login (postgre)

-- Table: public.web_login

-- DROP TABLE IF EXISTS public.web_login;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.web_login

(

id character varying(25) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
cari_kod character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
email character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
password_hash text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
role user_role NOT NULL DEFAULT 'CUSTOMER'::user_role,
is_active boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
last_login_at timestamp with time zone,
created_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now(),
updated_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now(),
CONSTRAINT web_cari_login_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
CONSTRAINT unique_email UNIQUE (email)

)

TABLESPACE pg_default;

ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.web_login

OWNER to postgres;

COMMENT ON TABLE public.web_login

IS 'Web portalı kullanıcı giriş bilgileri (Admin + Cari)';

COMMENT ON COLUMN public.web_login.cari_kod

IS 'SQL Server''daki CARI.KOD değeri';

COMMENT ON COLUMN public.web_login.password_hash

IS 'Sadece Admin için bcrypt hash - Cari için NULL';
